notes: Most often used for fleet maintenance, repair and service applications
Lift unit translates to the rear approximately 36 1/8 during vertical articulation
Use smooth electrical 90's in conduits, not plumbing 90's
Customer preference optional for conduit sizes and application
Materials shown on list shall be used without substitution unless specifically approved in writing by Mohawk Resources, Ltd.
Items supplied by Mohawk with the lift unit marked with *
